testcase.name: test_status_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payments.py:172: in test_status_endpoint assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Request req_5GJPdijS51IgtW: This property cannot be expanded (shipping_details)."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_portal_without_customer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payments.py:186: in test_portal_without_customer assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Request req_vxQ3mIjOUglBdx: No such customer: 'cus_UaxotfKZ0015XB'"} E assert 500 == 400 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
